name: Greenie carryover ON — proves carry + non-par-3 skip + multi-par-3 accumulation. Two unclaimed par-3s (H1, H3) roll 1 greenie each; the 3rd par-3 (H5) is won by a1 and SWEEPS the pot, worth 3 points (1 won + 2 carried). All nets = par so every base point is 0 — the ledger reflects GREENIE points only.
_contract: Golden HAND-CALC fixture for the F1 greenie modifier (Story 2.2). Greenies are contested ONLY on par-3s and are COUNT-BASED: rawA = (#teamA boxes) - (#teamB boxes), range -2..+2, each unit a team point (+1 each winner-team player / -1 each opponent). Carryover (the only greenie lever): an UNCLAIMED par-3 (zero boxes) rolls 1 greenie to the NEXT par-3 when ON; the winning team SWEEPS the pending pot when a par-3 is finally won (carryover stops once won). Non-par-3 holes are skipped (the pot never lands on a par-4/5). Isolation device: every net = par => all base points (low ball, skin, team total, net-skins) are 0, so the ledger is greenie-only. SettlementEdge IR is the post-Story-2.1a WHOLE-DOLLAR 1-to-1 layout (each loser pays ONE winner the full per-player amount, slot-paired teamA[i]<->teamB[i]); per-player nets + ledger total are identical to the pre-2.1a 4xpv/2 layout. Integer cents; fromPlayerId PAYS toPlayerId.
_handCalc:
Teams A={a1,a2} B={b1,b2}, flat $5/point (pv=500c), net-skins ON (contributes 0 here), greenie ON with carryover=true. Every net = par => low-ball tie, skin 0, team-total tie, net-skins equal-level no-blood => ALL base points 0 on every hole. Ledger = greenie only.

GREENIE FOLD over par-3s in holeNumber order, carry pot in POINTS:
  H1 (par 3): boxes none => rawA=0, zeroBoxes => UNCLAIMED. carryIn 0 -> carryOut 1 (rolls). award 0.
  H2 (par 4): NOT a par-3 => skipped; pot untouched (1).
  H3 (par 3): boxes none => UNCLAIMED. carryIn 1 -> carryOut 2 (rolls). award 0.
  H4 (par 5): NOT a par-3 => skipped; pot untouched (2).
  H5 (par 3): a1 box => countA=1 countB=0 => rawA=+1, WON. award = rawA + sign*carryIn = +1 + (+1)*2 = +3 to A. carryOut 0 (sweep stops carry).
settleablePar3Count=3, finalCarryPoints=0, pointsByHole={5:+3}.

SETTLE: only H5 has non-zero pts. pts(H5)= base 0 + greenie +3 = +3. pv=500 (whole-dollar). Each of the 4 cross pairs += pts*(pv/2)=3*250=750 toward A => each A player +1500c (+$15), each B player -1500c. Zero-sum (1500+1500-1500-1500=0).

EDGES (Story 2.1a WHOLE-DOLLAR 1-to-1): a1=a2=+1500, b1=b2=-1500. Each loser pays ONE winner the FULL amount, slot-paired teamA[i]<->teamB[i]: b1->a1 1500, b2->a2 1500. Sorted (from,to). ledgerTotal = 2*1500 = 3000c. No half-dollar leg.

CONSERVATION (carryover ON): Sum|pointsByHole| + finalCarry = 3 + 0 = 3. RHS over settleable par-3s (zeroBoxes?1:|rawA|) = H1(1)+H3(1)+H5(|+1|=1) = 3. Agrees: the carry mechanism creates/loses no points.
